title: autobench.improver.prediction.clipped v1
description: AHE prediction-feasibility clipping event. Emitted (nervous-bus-8d1d) when the improver proposed verdict-count deltas exceeding the headroom available in the next iteration's case budget — e.g. 'CE: -12' when only 4 CE cases existed. The harness clips each predicted delta to [-prior, num_cases - prior] before persisting via autobench.improver.prediction.v1; this event records the BEFORE state plus the per-verdict clip reasons so the calibration ledger can identify guaranteed-refute predictions. Source: /autobench.

iteration.description: RSI iteration in which the prediction was emitted (about iteration+1)

clip_reasons.description: One human-readable string per delta that was clipped, e.g. 'CE: clipped -12 → -4 (prior=4, min headroom=-4)'

original_verdict_changes.description: Verdict deltas as proposed by the improver (pre-clip)

clipped_verdict_changes.description: Verdict deltas after feasibility clipping (what actually got persisted)

original_confidence.description: Improver's self-reported confidence on the pre-clip prediction
